revision.comment: /* top */Switched to more comprehensive documentation ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/SdkbBot 4|task 4]])
1 revision imported: importing wikipedia

Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23518067722|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Neighborhoods of Tokyo | title = Neighborhoods of [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]] | state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} | listclass = hlist
| list1 = * [[:en:Akasaka, Tokyo|Akasaka]] * [[:en:Akihabara|Akihabara]] * [[:en:Aobadai|Aobadai]] * [[:en:Aomi|Aomi]] * [[:en:Aoyama, Tokyo|Aoyama]] * [[:en:Ariake, Tokyo|Ariake]] * [[:en:Asagaya|Asagaya]] * [[Asakusa]] * [[:en:Asakusabashi|Asakusabashi]] * [[:en:Azabu|Azabu]] * [[:en:Awajichō, Tokyo|Awajichō]] * [[:en:Nihonbashi Bakurochō|Bakurochō]] * [[:en:Daikanyamachō, Shibuya|Daikanyama]] * [[:en:Den-en-chōfu|Den-en-chōfu]] * [[:en:Ebisu, Shibuya|Ebisu]] * [[:en:Ebisuminami, Shibuya|Ebisuminami]] * [[:en:Futako-Tamagawa Station|Futako-tamagawa]] * [[:en:Ginza|Ginza]] * [[:en:Gotanda|Gotanda]] * [[:en:Hamamatsuchō|Hamamatsuchō]] * [[:en:Harajuku|Harajuku]] * [[:en:Hibiya|Hibiya]] * [[:en:Higashi, Shibuya|Higashi]] * [[:en:Higashi-Kanda|Higashikanda]] * [[:en:Hongō, Tokyo|Hongō]] * [[:en:Ichigaya|Ichigaya]] * [[:en:Iidabashi|Iidabashi]] * [[:en:Ikebukuro|Ikebukuro]] * [[:en:Iwamotochō|Iwamotochō]] * [[:en:Jiyūgaoka|Jiyūgaoka]] * [[:en:Jinbōchō, Tokyo|Jinbōchō]] * [[:en:Jūjō, Tokyo|Jūjō]] * [[:en:Kabukichō|Kabukichō]] * [[:en:Kagurazaka|Kagurazaka]] * [[:en:Kajichō, Tokyo|Kajichō]] * [[:en:Kamata, Tokyo|Kamata]] * [[:en:Kami-ikebukuro|Kamiikebukuro]] * [[:en:Kanda, Tokyo|Kanda]] * [[:en:Kasumigaseki|Kasumigaseki]] * [[:en:Kichijōji|Kichijōji]] * [[:en:Komaba|Komaba]] * [[:en:Koishikawa|Koishikawa]] * [[:en:Kugayama|Kugayama]] * [[:en:Kudankita|Kudankita]] * [[:en:Kyōbashi, Tokyo|Kyōbashi]] * [[:en:Kōenji|Kōenji]] * [[:en:Kōjimachi|Kōjimachi]] * [[:en:Marunouchi|Marunouchi]] * [[:en:Mejiro, Tokyo|Mejiro]] * [[:en:Mita, Minato, Tokyo|Mita]] * [[:en:Mita, Meguro, Tokyo|Meguro-mita]] * [[:en:Muromachi, Tokyo|Muromachi]] * [[:en:Nagatachō|Nagatachō]] * [[:en:Nakameguro|Nakameguro]] * [[:en:Nishigotanda|Nishigotanda]] * [[:en:Nishiogikubo|Nishiogikubo]] * [[:en:Nihonbashi|Nihonbashi]] * [[:en:Nishiōizumi|Nishiōizumi]] * [[:en:Nishiōizumimachi|Nishiōizumimachi]] * [[:en:Nishi-Shinjuku|Nishishinjuku]] * [[:en:Nishikichō|Nishikichō]] * [[:en:Ochanomizu|Ochanomizu]] * [[:en:Odaiba|Odaiba]] * [[:en:Ogawamachi, Tokyo|Ogawamachi]] * [[:en:Ogikubo, Tokyo|Ogikubo]] * [[:en:Ōizumigakuenchō|Ōizumigakuenchō]] * [[:en:Ōmori|Ōmori]] * [[:en:Omotesandō|Omotesandō]] * [[:en:Ōsaki, Tokyo|Ōsaki]] * [[:en:Ōtemachi|Ōtemachi]] * [[:en:Roppongi|Roppongi]] * [[:en:Ryōgoku|Ryōgoku]] * [[:en:San'ya|San'ya]] * [[:en:Sendagaya|Sendagaya]] * [[:en:Shiba, Tokyo|Shiba]] * [[:en:Shibaura|Shibaura]] * [[:en:Shibuya|Shibuya]] * [[:en:Shimokitazawa|Shimokitazawa]] * [[:en:Shinbashi|Shinbashi]] * [[:en:Shinjuku|Shinjuku]] * [[:en:Shinjuku Ni-chōme|Shinjuku Ni-chōme]] * [[:en:Shinonome, Tokyo|Shinonome]] * [[:en:Shiodome|Shiodome]] * [[:en:Shirokane|Shirokane]] * [[:en:Shirokanedai|Shirokanedai]] * [[:en:Shōtō, Shibuya|Shōtō]] * [[:en:Sudachō, Tokyo|Sudachō]] * [[:en:Sugamo|Sugamo]] * [[:en:Surugadai|Surugadai]] * [[:en:Takadanobaba|Takadanobaba]] * [[:en:Takanawa|Takanawa]] * [[:en:Tamachi|Tamachi]] * [[:en:Tateishi, Tokyo|Tateishi]] * [[:en:Tatsumi, Tokyo|Tatsumi]] * [[:en:Toyosu|Toyosu]] * [[:en:Tsukiji|Tsukiji]] * [[:en:Tsukishima|Tsukishima]] * [[:en:Uchi-Kanda|Uchikanda]] * [[:en:Uchisaiwaichō|Uchisaiwaichō]] * [[:en:Ueno|Ueno]] * [[:en:Wakasu|Wakasu]] * [[:en:Yaesu|Yaesu]] * [[:en:Yanaka, Tokyo|Yanaka]] * [[:en:Yayoi, Tokyo|Yayoi]] * [[:en:Yōga, Tokyo|Yōga]] * [[:en:Yotsuya|Yotsuya]] * [[:en:Yoyogi|Yoyogi]] * [[:en:Yūrakuchō|Yūrakuchō]] * [[:en:Zōshigaya|Zōshigaya]]
}}<noinclude> {{navbox documentation}} [[Category:Tokyo navigational boxes]] [[Category:Japan prefecture templates|Tokyo]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTNeighborhoods of Tokyo]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
